name: timet
description: An offline-first time-travel strategist app. Tell it the era, place, and goal — get a structured route to wealth, power, or survival.
author: wimi321

scripts.mobile:build: npm run build && cap sync && node scripts/ensure_ios_plugin_registration.mjs
scripts.mobile:android: npm run mobile:build && cap open android
scripts.mobile:ios: npm run mobile:build && cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android:release: npm run mobile:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$PATH ./gradlew assembleRelease bundleRelease
scripts.mobile:android:release:github: npm run mobile:build && cd android && JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/bin:$PATH ./gradlew assembleRelease -PbeaconBundleGemmaInApk=false -PbeaconArm64Only=true
